(Without applying the ENTERPRISE SEGMENT pattern, the same constraint would force the sales system to use only dimensions that can be used in a query to the Cargo Repository. This approach is feasible, but the sales system spills into other parts of the domain. In this design, the Cargo Repository need only be designed to handle Enterprise Segment, and changes in the sales system ripple only as far as the Allocation Checker, which was conceived as a FACADE in the first place.)

highlight.name: 8bdc1a6d-5ac1-53fa-4f31-a67ac5aac963
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: There is no alternative to the second message, which invokes the Sales Management System to answer the basic question of whether a certain cargo should be accepted. But the first message, which derives the Enterprise Segment for a cargo, is based on relatively static data and behavior compared to the allocation decisions themselves.

highlight.name: b26e64ef-1722-07c4-1dd4-f0c57a65263b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Why not give Cargo the responsibility of deriving the Enterprise Segment? At first glance it seems elegant, if all the data the derivation is based on is in the Cargo, to make it a derived attribute of Cargo.

highlight.name: 984dbdd9-526e-e95d-32f2-5f0ec9563383
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: arbitrarily

highlight.name: 960dd63e-02bd-23bc-872b-cc5e33690e4c
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: So the Cargo would have to know about the Allocation Checker, which is well outside its conceptual responsibility, and it would be laden with methods for deriving specific types of Enterprise Segment.

highlight.name: e62e8b3c-19d7-1f31-76ab-18deb7b0ebaa
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: disruptive

highlight.name: 8a5a4e75-6840-b896-2c15-d9376a14e8c6
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Therefore, the responsibility for deriving this value lies properly with the object that knows the rules for segmentation, rather than the object that has the data to which those rules apply.

highlight.name: 2ce4d3cc-4249-e853-b30d-5bffb0245acc
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Using a proven set of basic building blocks along with consistent language brings some sanity to the development effort.

highlight.name: b15c9198-2de3-a340-3895-80b05b97ddbb
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Of course, the real challenge is to actually find an incisive model, one that captures subtle concerns of the domain experts and can drive a practical design.

highlight.name: b9a9b7ed-0a73-7206-4a44-9fdd67f4b836
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: This part of the book will clarify that goal, describe the process by which it can be approached, and explain some design principles and patterns to apply to make the design accommodate the needs of the application as well as the developers themselves.

highlight.name: fe2a9e14-1bef-f2c6-c5b6-a2686fd6712f
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Rather than making elaborate up-front design decisions, developers take code through a continuous series of small, discrete design changes, each leaving existing functionality unchanged while making the design more flexible or easier to understand.

highlight.name: e5f4aa0a-eca1-9bac-2404-5805dda646ae
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: But nearly all the literature on how to refactor focuses on mechanical changes to the code that make it easier to read or to enhance at a very detailed level.

highlight.name: 927400fb-8690-b31e-1752-32fb52c9990b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: This type of refactoring does not in any way replace the refactorings to design patterns or the micro-refactorings, which should proceed continuously.

highlight.name: 97728227-972d-576b-a997-3272fdc777d4
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: refactoring to a deeper model.

highlight.name: e0a0bf1e-9a84-1a72-214f-68912a8dbe8d
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Modeling is as inherently unstructured as any exploration. Refactoring to deeper insight should follow wherever learning and deep thinking lead.

highlight.name: 0f8611f0-0516-af2b-8f70-1e1c1d5eaa52
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: but we shouldn’t get sidetracked trying to reduce domain modeling to a cookbook or 142 a toolkit.

highlight.name: 35f3e2b0-810f-8943-b258-acda157a6021
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Modeling and design call for creativity.

highlight.name: 3b43e1bd-1140-0797-f89a-caca86d9eea9
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The ship itself was secondary, and could be substituted at the last minute for maintenance or a slipping schedule, while the vessel voyage went on as planned.

highlight.name: 2fb2dbd8-5330-2471-6d21-37326bc908ce
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Less obvious objects, such as the “bill of lading,” came to the fore.

highlight.name: ba744abe-094c-05d7-b026-11c1f3af7df1
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: A deep model provides a lucid expression of the primary concerns of the domain experts and their most relevant knowledge while it sloughs off the superficial aspects of the domain.

highlight.name: 8ab84b31-4002-8bbd-f9b0-3896e9cc3dab
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Versatility, simplicity, and explanatory power come from a model that is truly in tune with the domain.

highlight.name: f2fb15dd-2164-9346-e341-62e984d22473
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: In a process of constant refactoring, the design itself needs to support change. Chapter 10 looks at ways to make a design easy to work with, both for those changing it and for those integrating it with other parts of the system.

highlight.name: 2828ebf5-23ae-2b10-fac7-77b9e0e84322
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: A well-worn glove becomes supple at the points where the fingers bend, while other parts are stiff and protective.

highlight.name: e2cc01dc-ee79-78b8-465c-799712ee5259
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: In addition to facilitating change, a supple design contributes to the refinement of the model itself.

highlight.name: 136be416-36ab-4d45-cbd4-fb6b45b1de97
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: To create a design really fitted to the problem at hand, you must first have a model that captures the central relevant concepts of the domain.

highlight.name: 0aa5166a-927b-0d67-6c19-e79769c2d0b4
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: rigor

highlight.name: a4f15e06-61a7-3955-d4d0-9e9463f14af2
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Such patterns are not ready-made solutions, but they feed your knowledge crunching process and narrow your search.

highlight.name: 2d1caaeb-87b0-fc1f-0281-5e0b9ce99f7b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: An opportunity opens up to transform your software into something more expressive and versatile than you expected. This can mean new features or it can just mean the replacement of a big chunk of rigid code with a simple, flexible expression of a

highlight.name: cd4d4a99-762b-f6ea-d6da-4b4a8cfba9de
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: This can mean new features or it can just mean the replacement of a big chunk of rigid code with a simple, flexible expression of a deeper model.

highlight.name: 980569b0-8c13-296d-66ba-3dd6acb93706
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Nonetheless, it provides a good context for thinking about domain refactoring.

highlight.name: 6c85c516-bfaf-e8f5-6184-a1e53d14b8c3
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: They fight entropy, and they are the frontline protection against a fossilized legacy.

highlight.name: 5b8488b8-9a68-ad0b-94df-258536d67745
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Slowly but surely, the team assimilates knowledge and crunches it into a model. Deep models can emerge gradually through a sequence of small refactorings, an object at a time: a tweaked association here, a shifted responsibility there.

highlight.name: 0a3646a1-0332-9489-84ea-63e0a0f60d9c
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Versatility and explanatory power suddenly increase even as complexity evaporates.

highlight.name: 556983ac-2100-467a-f364-f26ed5577f4c
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: syndicated loans

highlight.name: ed58be04-d79d-f4bf-6ad0-d08b825260bf
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: facility

highlight.name: a865fb67-b4e6-1682-b5a8-40124fc8aff0
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: A major example was the creeping understanding that the shares in a Facility were only a guideline to participation in any particular loan draw-down.

highlight.name: fb991a0c-e65e-2d1d-6459-16aa1c1487ad
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Refinements of this kind allowed us to keep up as the rules of various transactions became clearer. But complexity was increasing, and we did not seem to be converging quickly onto really solid functionality.

highlight.name: 68440251-7cc8-7fe5-2366-1cac298fe32e
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: We began to suspect that our difficulties were symptomatic of a basic design problem.

highlight.name: 9c0c6da3-2784-0b0f-6ae5-880d391bf65a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Suddenly one week it dawned on us what was wrong.

highlight.name: 925e3932-471d-e974-cf8a-f26bd3b02f1d
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: This revelation had wide repercussions.

highlight.name: f151cfde-17e0-fb94-b6ba-8aeb4fbf3180
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Although the details hadn’t jelled yet,

highlight.name: d1d6e490-5537-22c6-5e51-c5c1d0375a6b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: lenders

highlight.name: 52654fda-c98a-7216-c321-782f51d40f8b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: drawdown

highlight.name: 2584bede-1c98-15e4-f3ea-944cdd948ca6
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: proportional

highlight.name: 948ae963-1078-110c-cb61-a1b2be2e3c0a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: When the drawdown amounts are added to the Loan, the shares of the Loan are no longer proportional to the shares of the Facility.

highlight.name: fdc7a066-2ea8-3673-d0d3-deacb614bb96
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: A few tumultuous days later I had sketched a model of shares, drawing on the language used in the discussions with experts and the scenarios we had explored together.

highlight.name: c514f0db-b7ab-6f28-b05b-45a53da58623
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: It freed the Loan’s Shares to depart from the proportions of the Facility’s Shares, while keeping in place the valid constraints on totals, fee distributions, and so on.

highlight.name: e5d78efa-d7d7-a673-493b-f7d9804f7a37
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: They had deferred to our software knowledge and assumed it was useful to the technical design.

highlight.name: 0e193206-5a14-3055-c099-224b5b190bd7
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: A Sobering Decision

highlight.name: f9f7dd49-fcb3-99fd-97b8-16503950041a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The gospel of refactoring is that you always go in small steps, always keeping everything working.

highlight.name: 900931b7-6491-5eb7-c01f-d194a22257b9
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: We knew the political situation was unstable, so we’d cope if we had to. And we were tired. But, yes, it was a simpler solution that fit the business much better. In the long run it was lower risk.

highlight.name: f703b3fe-6794-62ef-ab57-77c7a65233b7
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: You might reasonably assume that we would have been elated at this point.

highlight.name: cad82f52-32c3-ea1c-fdd1-2777d81486f0
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: But to refactor our code to this new model would require changing a lot of supporting code, and there would be few, if any, stable stopping points in between.

highlight.name: c6a9a2eb-6f62-d211-a02e-76d877877147
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: tremendous admiration

highlight.name: 9d7fbebf-0751-8708-f480-94b34db9a852
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The mystifyingly unexpected requirement changes stopped. The rounding logic, though never exactly simple, stabilized and made sense. We delivered version one and the way was clear to version two. My nervous breakdown was narrowly averted.

highlight.name: 0f37f925-7197-4bbe-f67b-404dd8ef0c9b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: syndication

highlight.name: 7be47d3f-f66f-ec27-ed91-6a5515bca115
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Much as we might like it to be otherwise, progress isn’t a smooth ride. The transition to a really deep model is a profound shift in your thinking and demands a major change to the design.

highlight.name: 8d3fbb95-8d80-fb87-3097-701d3772c7ad
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Don’t become paralyzed trying to bring about a breakthrough.

highlight.name: 0e3fe7bb-bfea-5ccb-7b7c-ea4c8f31a98c
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Most of the time is spent making piecemeal improvements, with model insights emerging gradually during each successive refinement.

highlight.name: d9edc60b-e63d-e4e9-ad21-3d1feba205ce
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: To set the stage for a breakthrough, concentrate on knowledge crunching and cultivating a robust UBIQUITOUS LANGUAGE. Probe for important domain concepts and make them explicit in the model (as discussed in Chapter 9). Refine the design to be suppler (see Chapter 10). Distill the model (see Chapter 15). Push on these more predictable levers, which increase clarity—usually a precursor of breakthroughs.

highlight.name: 162a818e-fbcb-3ee4-3af6-243aa387e635
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Don’t hold back from modest improvements, which gradually deepen the model, even if confined within the same general conceptual framework. Don’t be paralyzed by looking too far forward. Just be watchful for the opportunity.

highlight.name: 34506fef-59e0-300f-eb0b-93638d9f5644
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: A deep model has power because it contains the central concepts and abstractions that can succinctly and flexibly express essential knowledge of the users’ activities, their problems, and their solutions. The first step is to somehow represent the essential concepts of the domain in the model. Refinement comes later, after successive iterations of knowledge crunching and refactoring. But this process really gets into gear when an important concept is recognized and made explicit in the model and design.

highlight.name: 87baeca6-c6a3-765c-2228-a6628f6870d5
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Many transformations of domain models and the corresponding code happen when developers recognize a concept that has been hinted at in discussion or present implicitly in the design, and they then represent it explicitly in the model with one or more objects or relationships.

highlight.name: 1b0ff44e-d3e8-9267-16d8-49427c908e78
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The UBIQUITOUS LANGUAGE is made up of the vocabulary that pervades speech, documents, model diagrams, and even code. If a term is absent from the design, it is an opportunity to improve the model and design by including it.

highlight.name: 8fda3d3b-b65a-3056-08c3-0e82f4d3442b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: juggle

highlight.name: 088234fd-c745-440e-5dbd-2f5d6320292d
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The booking application used a routing engine to plan the trip for a cargo. Each leg of the journey was stored in a row of a database table, indicating the ID of the vessel voyage (a particular voyage by a particular ship) slated to carry the cargo, the location where it would be loaded, and the location where it would be unloaded.

highlight.name: 18205f19-80ee-e097-292a-c741a902845b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Scrutinize Awkwardness

highlight.name: 9967b347-c3de-ba0e-f4a3-1d6ad3397b0a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Sometimes it can be hard to recognize that there even is a missing concept. You may have objects doing all the work but find some of the responsibilities awkward. Or, if you do realize something is missing, a model solution may elude you.

highlight.name: 9240d310-9af2-1d4e-c580-928273de00f6
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Now you have to actively engage the domain experts in the search.

highlight.name: f336aa1e-c642-c74e-8185-6a163a51b0f0
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: We still have more cases we’ve been holding back.

highlight.name: c169a42c-a5bf-a1c6-d616-f9b98046ecf4
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Actually, the interest calculation would be simpler if it was done just for one day, or period. And then we could just hang on to them all.

highlight.name: 10fbd754-5fc3-1738-c494-a83cd178dc86
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: With this model, we get the interest calculation, or rather, the accrual calculation logic that was in the Interest Calculator separated from tracking. And I hadn’t noticed until now how much duplication there is in the Fee Calculator. Also, now the different kinds of fees can easily be added. Expert: Yes, the calculation was correct before, but I can see everything now.

highlight.name: ba1dd29f-f2ad-5eb2-5053-4067c7365abf
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: She could see the awkwardness of the interest calculations and made a committed effort to look for a deeper answer.

highlight.name: d985d8e6-e672-26b3-8366-8ecd0f56706b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: With a more passive source of expertise, she would have made more false starts and depended more on other developers as brainstorming partners.

highlight.name: 6ed0af98-647a-a1c5-21e3-399bf7e5868e
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Contemplate Contradictions

highlight.name: dbab0cc8-c1e4-1e6f-cfaa-3e16c8604ef4
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Such pesky contradictions, which we encounter all the time when digging into program requirements, can be great clues to deeper models.

highlight.name: fa39087d-322b-a003-ac1e-5bb922dfcf3a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: But there is a residue where two factual statements by experts seem to contradict.

highlight.name: 2f04deb7-6d1b-d83e-7078-17de463f0384
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: astronomer

highlight.name: 2bf6f41b-cd70-abd2-a7ca-5e93afb38f3c
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Galileo

highlight.name: 3d28512a-840b-58cf-6203-66f25754387d
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Copernicus

highlight.name: 111d3e29-b838-d49c-4806-99830bdfbb04
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: paradox.

highlight.name: 464b5f98-70da-41be-ebc1-61a99549ba44
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: From this he deduced an early form of the idea of inertial frames of reference, solving the paradox and leading to a much more useful model of the physics of motion.

highlight.name: 403f673c-5e77-2c46-f7b2-02b9ce4971fb
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Even so, this same pattern of thought often helps pierce the superficial layers of a problem domain into a deeper insight.

highlight.name: 8f70f337-f856-a28b-2c4b-cf34de9c4c53
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: revealing.

highlight.name: 032b4381-ddb8-7e4e-d555-b567035fb802
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Don’t overlook the obvious when seeking model concepts.

highlight.name: 5bc0e89a-d80c-51df-16de-23cb0f83b55b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Just as before, the story starts with the developer realizing that the design is getting unwieldy, particularly the Interest Calculator.

highlight.name: b5aa02a8-38cb-fb90-eb0d-98c3788fe352
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: In this scenario, the developer couldn’t turn to the expert for a brainstorming session to probe for the missing concepts she suspected to be lurking under the surface.

highlight.name: db7757d5-9936-9fd8-ce6a-1e19e6231220
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: introductory

highlight.name: ae1370df-5eff-b61f-53af-2b29e3b3834b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Accrual Basis Accounting. This method recognizes income when it is earned, even if it is not paid. All expenses also show when they are incurred whether they have been paid for or billed to be paid at a later date. Any obligation due, including taxes, will be shown as expense.

highlight.name: 59cb7533-2376-753d-7423-030234c09a77
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: glimmer

highlight.name: c35d4f16-26cd-90ed-70c9-4b7d82a2d496
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: engaged

highlight.name: e4535e5a-1017-a746-6a9d-0a95a3bea627
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: proposition.

highlight.name: 16cd8217-9cb1-0feb-9ad5-8a58ff4d590a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: ample

highlight.name: 504654d3-013e-98b2-a0d6-09ebad8f3019
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: grasp

highlight.name: c39efd58-6802-84bb-fc1b-eb4c37dfd6ca
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Such reading would not have provided an off-the-shelf solution. It would have given several new starting points for her own experiments, along with the distilled experience of people who have traveled the territory. She would have been spared reinventing the wheel.

highlight.name: 66d22f72-57b6-567d-a3fb-715ade18fc99
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Here are some warning signs that a constraint is distorting the design of its host object.

highlight.name: f5a744ce-f2fb-a112-4fa0-ae59e89af73a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: When the constraints are obscuring the object’s basic responsibility, or when the constraint is prominent in the domain yet not prominent in the model, you can factor it out into an explicit object or even model it as a set of objects and relationships.

highlight.name: a4af4410-1b3b-af88-b3ac-872ade7c0c32
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Factoring the constraint into its own method allows us to give it an intention-revealing name that makes the constraint explicit in our design. It is now a named thing we can discuss.

highlight.name: e075ddd0-0772-d351-338d-b94bf8b4e4fa
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: There really is no choice, anyway. Experimentation is the way to learn what works and doesn’t. Trying to avoid missteps in design will result in a lower quality result because it will be based on less experience. And it can easily take longer than a series of quick experiments.

highlight.name: f7fcbf89-ee3f-37b6-f784-dded1d9084fb
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The examples I’ve given don’t convey the amount of trial and error involved. I might follow half a dozen leads in conversation before finding one that seems clear and useful enough to try out in the model. I’ll end up replacing that one at least once later, as additional experience and knowledge crunching serve up better ideas. A modeler/designer cannot afford to get attached to his own ideas.

highlight.name: a0c8b25a-0737-8837-7642-629bd7c90e3c
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Each refactoring leaves the design more supple, easier to change the next time, ready to bend in the places that turn 163

highlight.name: 3308e498-64a1-1823-9de5-a75448af4280
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: (Experience has taught shipping firms that this overbooking compensates for last- minute cancellations, so their ships will sail nearly full.

highlight.name: 3c7ba5ce-83ac-13f8-5c9f-762186e83f9f
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Right up front, let’s agree that we do not want to make procedures a prominent aspect of our model.

highlight.name: 883bd683-66ab-b7b6-a1ad-d9cd13b75e53
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The first example in this chapter described a shipping system that routed cargo. This routing process was something with business meaning. A SERVICE is one way of expressing such a process explicitly, while still encapsulating the extremely complex algorithms.

highlight.name: c724a974-87d3-cbce-c319-e2210c8cdeb1
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The key to distinguishing a process that ought to be made explicit from one that should be hidden is simple: Is this something the domain experts talk about, or is it just part of the mechanism of the computer program?

highlight.name: bbcfac04-cc66-3e98-5b1e-e469973eaaf1
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: SPECIFICATION provides a concise way of expressing certain kinds of rules, extricating them from conditional logic and making them explicit in the model.

highlight.name: bce95d82-7c18-47be-956c-fa43564c8eac
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: A policy on grace periods could depend on the status of the customer’s account. Some delinquent invoices will be ready for a second notice, while others will be ready to be sent to a collection agency. The payment history of the customer, company policy on different product lines . . . the clarity of Invoice as a request for payment will soon be lost in the sheer mass of rule evaluation code.

highlight.name: 32d3d63e-c78e-8598-9781-9751d872d3a0
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: conditional code,

highlight.name: de517833-290f-3bfb-1789-6e56b5b638c5
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Predicates are functions that evaluate to “true” or “false” and can be combined using operators such as “AND” and “OR” to express more complex rules.

highlight.name: b15231a3-ce64-6fef-1084-67a5ef762ce6
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Some were ambitious, others modest.

highlight.name: 6a7ca5fd-2cf9-e526-1e7e-cdb97d0b010d
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: As appealing as the idea is, full implementation of logic in objects is a major undertaking. (After all, logic programming is a whole modeling and design paradigm in its own right.)

highlight.name: c36c67d2-6d9e-feac-ba53-dd62b664f2e3
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: To put it another way, the new object is a specification. A SPECIFICATION states a constraint on the state of another object, which may or may not be present. It has multiple uses, but one that conveys the most basic concept is that a SPECIFICATION can test any object to see if it satisfies the specified criteria.

highlight.name: 16ecc011-cece-3f67-921d-038776051006
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The SPECIFICATION keeps the rule in the domain layer. Because the rule is a full-fledged object, the design can be a more explicit reflection of the model.

highlight.name: b9b3f1fb-f561-be63-54f6-5dcae02b2a0e
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: A SPECIFICATION can be given the information it will need to do its job in a simple, straightforward way.

highlight.name: 95d74f60-434a-18a6-b3f4-91d5c206fbc1
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: You may want to skim the key concepts when first reading. Later, when you run into the situation, you can come back and draw on the experience captured in the detailed discussion. Then you can go and figure out a solution to your problem.

highlight.name: 5c342529-ccc1-8aa5-ebe6-1ac36babdb06
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: guises,

highlight.name: cd2718be-6277-1508-87d2-8500695a1aa2
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Relational databases have powerful search capabilities. How can we take advantage of that power to solve this problem efficiently while retaining the model of a SPECIFICATION? MODEL-DRIVEN DESIGN demands that the model stay in lockstep with the implementation, but it allows freedom to choose any implementation that faithfully captures the meaning of the model. Lucky for us, SQL is a very natural way to write SPECIFICATIONS.

highlight.name: 8c69dd8b-3a20-2138-79fc-fc7991296906
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: SPECIFICATIONS mesh smoothly with REPOSITORIES, which are the building-block mechanisms for providing query access to domain objects and encapsulating the interface to the database

highlight.name: 3c6fcd02-bc6c-6e0f-165c-352ee0b24a73
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: When the infrastructure doesn’t come to the rescue, we can refactor the SQL out of the expressive domain objects by adding a specialized query method to the Invoice Repository.

highlight.name: c25c9b7e-bb3f-26fa-ffc0-0e5001eed686
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The REPOSITORY now has a very specialized query that most likely will be used only in this case. That is acceptable, but depending on the relative numbers of Invoices that are overdue compared to those that are delinquent, an intermediate solution that leaves the REPOSITORY methods more generic may still give good performance, while keeping the SPECIFICATION more self-explanatory.

highlight.name: 32272af5-41be-3e3d-113f-850a62aaab92
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: We’ll take a performance hit with this code, because we pull out more Invoices and then have to select from them in memory.

highlight.name: 628fa0b4-8543-b11e-2198-2305f0493f03
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Whether this is an acceptable cost for the better factoring of responsibility depends entirely on circumstances.

highlight.name: 74a426f1-7784-bc45-0aaf-cbf335fa77a9
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Sometimes, to improve performance, or more likely to tighten security, queries may be implemented on the server as stored procedures. In that case, the SPECIFICATION could carry only the parameters allowed by the stored procedure. For all that, there is no difference in the model between these various implementations. The choice of implementation is free except where specifically constrained by the model. The price comes in a more cumbersome way of writing and maintaining queries.

highlight.name: 120581a4-c64d-ef8e-015b-d758667d8c2c
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Mee and Hieatt discuss a few of the technical issues involved in designing REPOSITORIES with SPECIFICATIONS in Fowler 2003.

highlight.name: 0c4b5570-79be-c41e-5b0f-2f0564ea2cdb
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The interface is more flexible, or can be enhanced with more flexibility, because the statement of the request is in the hands of the client, while the generator is only obligated to fulfill the letter of the SPECIFICATION.

highlight.name: 86452100-cd93-bac3-4af9-3d0d80ab6d44
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Building to order can mean creation of an object from scratch, but it can also be a configuration of preexisting objects to satisfy the SPEC.

highlight.name: b46bbd40-d6bb-9588-7417-6253e2c8771e
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Packer

highlight.title: Guest

highlight.contents: explosive

highlight.name: 613f2d91-e429-9410-5495-0b51812acf37

highlight.contents: ventilated

highlight.name: 738a31a8-4e15-35ce-1ab5-808fd0408e1c
highlight.title: Guest

highlight.contents: compliance

highlight.name: a7664cc5-8d9b-9a1d-1496-a88cfd6466c2
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: A small team of developers and business experts have split off and have set to work on it, but they haven’t even begun to code

highlight.name: 6dde5785-ea35-e742-0209-c9b2c1d9eae9
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: They are trying to design for the anticipated 176 Packer.

highlight.name: 832137d8-6f79-7b37-66c3-e11050e710e3
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: vacuum

highlight.name: 69649b40-df27-adde-4a0a-f606fc18794d
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: With the domain objects and SERVICE interface made in the warehouse packer example, the application team realizes they could build a very simple implementation of a Packer that could help the development process move along, allowing work to go forward in parallel and closing the feedback loop, which only reaches full effect with a working end-to-end system.

highlight.name: 67652d87-9d5d-c412-aa5f-f0ef9a9df387
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: hazardous

highlight.name: ec513253-8e85-5593-8496-28f51f2ff9e4
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: revenues.

highlight.name: ff05750b-88d9-6e94-f129-2d03284f88e9
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: congestion

highlight.name: 8a31abea-b180-3faf-f40e-3069ff9fe23b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: One team has to wait for working code from another in order to move forward. Both teams have to wait for full integration to exercise their components or get feedback from users. This kind of congestion can often be eased by a MODEL-DRIVEN prototype of a key component, even if it does not satisfy all requirements. When implementation is decoupled from interface, then having any working implementation at all allows flexibility for project work to go in parallel. When the time is right, the prototype can be replaced by a more effective implementation. In the meantime, all other parts of the system have something to interact with during development.

highlight.name: ae8e943d-4417-ec7d-62d5-9f03981d0579
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: firm up

highlight.name: 9ae8eb96-0a04-0287-10bf-ca5f2b0bec8b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: They also keep the interface up-to-date with their latest design, forcing refactoring of the application, and some domain objects, thereby tackling the integration problems early.

highlight.name: e4b53fe9-998c-e061-45a2-4630a7ca97c0
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Here we have an example of a “simplest thing that could possibly work” that actually becomes possible because of a more sophisticated model. We can have a functioning prototype of a very complex component in a couple dozen lines of easily understood code. A less MODEL-DRIVEN approach would be harder to understand, would be harder to upgrade (because the Packer would be more coupled to the rest of the design), and in this case, would likely take longer to prototype.

highlight.name: 23d85042-42e9-2c59-af0a-316550874855
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: This is especially true in a process that emphasizes refactoring.

highlight.name: 1f93fdaa-6aca-a832-4861-3d97e923ae03
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: When software doesn’t have a clean design, developers dread even looking at the existing mess, much less making a change that could aggravate the tangle or break something through an unforeseen dependency.

highlight.name: 07dd5bb8-6990-7494-2eea-1ce32c94e2dd
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: In any but the smallest systems, this fragility places a ceiling on the richness of behavior it is feasible to build. It stops refactoring and iterative refinement.

highlight.name: 851b0082-0caf-d64b-73fa-4a40a677bd0e
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Supple design is the complement to deep modeling.

highlight.name: 523ca639-43bf-c624-1dce-db261e8a30fc
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Through the iterative cycle, you hammer that material into a useful shape, cultivating a model that simply and clearly captures the key concerns, and shaping a design that allows a client developer to really put that model to work.

highlight.name: 8d304985-068a-8592-209c-ffefb6089dde
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: To create elements that can be assembled into elaborate systems and still be understandable, a dedication to MODEL-DRIVEN DESIGN has to be joined with a moderately rigorous design style.

highlight.name: 62168433-916f-f06d-f4f0-071e0c1464db
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: nonetheless.

highlight.name: 5e865c46-045e-7f42-16ec-fb2018cbce0a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The same person might well play both roles—even switch back and forth in minutes—but the relationship to the code is different nonetheless.

highlight.name: abb1d617-f420-2f4b-b4dd-87f2efed5d0b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: contours

highlight.name: 4c37fec4-3042-9319-b9c2-6f37e1c029af
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: It must follow the contours of a deep model of the domain, so most changes bend the design at flexible points.

highlight.name: 97f7eded-f6a7-39ba-acfd-f0fa4f64c3b3
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: stiff.

highlight.name: 70f36674-f8d2-130e-65d0-21780661fe27
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: We are always fighting cognitive overload: If the client developer’s mind is flooded with detail about how a component does its job, his mind isn’t clear to work out the intricacies of the client design.

highlight.name: 4330de9b-a62d-d369-042b-30f486855099
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: To obtain the value of explicitly modeling a concept in the form of a class or method, we must give these program elements names that reflect those concepts. The names of classes and methods are great opportunities for improving communication between developers, and for improving the abstraction of the system.

highlight.name: 9206ca4a-9358-4bd3-1538-1c397ff74196
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: In the public interfaces of the domain, state relationships and rules, but not how they are enforced; describe events and actions, but not how they are carried out; formulate the equation but not the numerical method to solve it. Pose the question, but don’t present the means by which the answer shall be found.

highlight.name: f368c5ac-eb9d-d050-faa3-a5ef42fe5c89
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Entire subdomains can be carved off into separate modules and encapsulated behind INTENTION-REVEALING INTERFACES. Using such whittling to focus a project and manage the complexity of a large system will be discussed more in Chapter 15, “Distillation,” with COHESIVE MECHANISMS and GENERIC SUBDOMAINS.

highlight.name: fb62787a-fc27-7b28-74bf-551216ca91e7
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: In standard English, the term side effect implies an unintended consequence, but in computer science, it means any effect on the state of the system.

highlight.name: 16b66cbb-2f35-ccd7-5247-eb89c70dd01b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: As soon as this arbitrarily deep nesting is involved, it becomes very hard to anticipate all the consequences of invoking an operation.

highlight.name: 1b6538eb-5b00-6ca6-e71b-bf6fe36acb72
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The use of the term side effect underlines the inevitability of that interaction.

highlight.name: 312d4389-c368-6496-c857-a1baa3d25218
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The usefulness of any abstraction of interfaces is limited if the developers are forced to pierce the veil.

highlight.name: acfce943-c847-2013-ff88-068b0754bcb0
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Obviously, you can’t avoid commands in most software systems, but the problem can be mitigated in two ways.

highlight.name: 3b4b62d5-f2c5-36a6-a23d-3ac3262a5515
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: But by definition, this segregation of side effects into simple command methods only applies to ENTITIES.

highlight.name: 9513c475-e32d-5090-18cb-0e0b1f2f3782
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The side effect often can be completely eliminated by deriving a VALUE OBJECT instead of changing existing state, or by moving the entire responsibility into a VALUE OBJECT.

highlight.name: 6f41fffa-7a80-d697-6018-3e0ea7625260
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Strictly segregate commands (methods that result in modifications to observable state) into very simple operations that do not return domain information. Further control side effects by moving complex logic into VALUE OBJECTS when a concept fitting the responsibility presents itself.

highlight.name: da8b6815-abf6-247e-d288-a508943f7491
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Separating complex computations into SIDE-EFFECT-FREE FUNCTIONS cuts the problem down to size, but there is still a residue of commands on the ENTITIES that produce side effects, and anyone using them must understand their consequences.

highlight.name: 1eb2dfc5-27b6-7cdc-f17c-744f3de76ad0
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: We need a way of understanding the meaning of a design element and the consequences of executing an operation without delving into its internals.

highlight.name: 61b01eeb-9a43-62cb-1eb6-458cf7712372
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: “design by contract”

highlight.name: 5b9a05e8-11e2-9016-ec6a-4ec4b14c81cc
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Seek models with coherent sets of concepts, which lead a developer to infer the intended ASSERTIONS, accelerating the learning curve and reducing the risk of contradictory code.

highlight.name: 6cf2e4c2-29ee-7803-90ba-0a8d35b43df5
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Because ASSERTIONS are all in terms of states, rather than procedures, they make tests easy to write.

highlight.name: 39ab60de-5142-1881-4593-9db6cf10233b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Theoretically, any noncontradictory set of assertions would work. But humans don’t just compile predicates in their heads.

highlight.name: 3f07bb8d-33e0-f9f4-c8a2-4c8a32ffdbaf
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: While developers were pondering this option, they made a discovery.

highlight.name: e01e3a2e-f096-8aa0-0b8a-bf043e4d723e
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: So, to make the volume model logically consistent would make it unsuitable for its application requirements. There seems to be a dilemma.

highlight.name: 5c39de19-c3ff-ae69-a973-0901eb49e555
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: interim.

highlight.name: 2d36530a-1353-0d89-9047-326308492b75
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: As we search for a better model, we have significant advantages over the original designers, because of the knowledge crunching and refactoring to deeper insight that has happened in the interim.

highlight.name: d4e8d374-6822-a454-fd2c-0ed493f7334b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The next ingredient in recombinable elements is effective decomposition. . . .

highlight.name: 4a1b5ee4-7cac-2aee-6d50-85be5b5d7bea
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Sometimes people chop functionality fine to allow flexible combination. Sometimes they lump it large to encapsulate complexity.

highlight.name: 42828ba2-0afc-a3a8-b5df-76c3a5bdb976
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: When elements of a model or design are embedded in a monolithic construct, their functionality gets duplicated. The external interface doesn’t say everything a client might care about. Their meaning is hard to understand, because different concepts are mixed together.

highlight.name: 11504847-c60d-d6a0-6d71-f41b94c919bf
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: On the other hand, breaking down classes and methods can pointlessly complicate the client, forcing client objects to understand how tiny pieces fit together.

highlight.name: 7f458dfc-3e04-3c9d-8345-25dfe6c521ae
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Half of a uranium atom is not uranium. And of course, it isn’t just grain size that counts, but just where the grain runs.

highlight.name: bbcadcf1-25fe-6bcc-43f7-b3218a718df2
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: But there is rhyme and reason somewhere, or else modeling would be pointless.

highlight.name: 8d17d686-4ccc-b4f5-f8a3-bbfb8c6f6463
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: To avoid slipping into a mechanistic view of them, temper your technical thinking by frequently touching base with your intuition for the domain.

highlight.name: c3548b0d-ccc4-b877-73fd-b40b99d91c93
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: “Is this an expedient based on a particular set of relationships in the current model and code, or does it echo some contour of the underlying domain?

highlight.name: bb22c68c-6220-016c-c7ae-1927d4df3d0d
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Clumping things that don’t need to be dissected or rearranged avoids clutter and makes it easier to see the elements that really are meant to recombine.

highlight.name: c8a5f298-f74e-0dd6-1b3c-4151c5bb5cc5
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Decompose design elements (operations, interfaces, classes, and AGGREGATES) into cohesive units, taking into consideration your intuition of the important divisions in the domain.

highlight.name: 2e316e18-e1ac-e7ec-c8c2-fb02438f4e06
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: it’s hard to produce up front. But it may never emerge from technically oriented refactoring; it emerges from refactoring toward deeper insight.

highlight.name: 5289de10-88f7-9768-23b6-06b755e344c7
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: When successive refactoring tends to be localized, not shaking multiple broad concepts of the model, it is an indicator of model fit.

highlight.name: b2516318-428c-32e7-a678-9588fc829ea5
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The new model contained only one more object than the old one, yet the partitioning of responsibility had been greatly changed.

highlight.name: f1d4afb7-8fcc-1575-42f5-1a4e19741162
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Schedules, which had been worked out through case logic in the Calculator classes, were exploded into discrete classes for different types of fees and interest. On the other hand, payments of fees and interest, previously kept separate, were lumped together.

highlight.name: b00b0c89-060e-d03d-c96e-5d4f2e9553db
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: But had she found a CONCEPTUAL CONTOUR that will help the domain design change and grow as the application and the business evolve? There can be no guarantees about how a design will handle unanticipated change, but she thought it had improved the odds.

highlight.name: 4c0c8254-cb58-be8d-74b0-8071751f76ff
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: As the project proceeded, a requirement emerged for detailed rules for handling early and late payments.

highlight.name: bb795481-5492-0d33-863a-9d2c93066159
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Nor did it come because she made a design so versatile it could accommodate any conceivable change. It happened because in the previous refactoring, the design was aligned with underlying concepts of the domain.

highlight.name: 990a3f0d-861b-6643-7b4a-0a912688a41f
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: INTENTION-REVEALING INTERFACES allow clients to present objects as units of meaning rather than just mechanisms. SIDE-EFFECT-FREE FUNCTIONS and ASSERTIONS make it safe to use those units and make complex combinations. The emergence of CONCEPTUAL CONTOURS stabilizes parts of the model and also makes the units more intuitive to use and combine.

highlight.name: f532ff18-1672-724b-c6c6-04babc46be30
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: And interdependencies pile up easily.

highlight.name: 8ced132d-1532-1915-5515-9a92f8a20f98
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: But even a MODULE can be a lot to think about without an almost fanatical commitment to controlling dependencies within it.

highlight.name: e2833723-a0ad-c92c-7a35-926aa04f5612
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: In every programming environment, a few basics are so pervasive that they are always in mind.

highlight.name: c28313b1-7f56-0e4d-0f77-9c82fbda2853
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Practically speaking, “integers” don’t add to the intellectual load.

highlight.name: f8d65633-209b-9af6-f975-18c254f4feda
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Implicit concepts, recognized or unrecognized, count just as much as explicit references. Although we can generally ignore dependencies on primitive values such as integers and strings, we can’t ignore what they represent.

highlight.name: 8dc056d3-e07b-486e-8e19-b9f8e5f132f5
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: This scrutiny starts with the factoring of the model concepts themselves. Then it requires attention to each individual association and operation. Model and design choices can chip away at dependencies—often to zero.

highlight.name: 73a70765-1d08-2212-6f11-56ae0ca85b2c
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Every such self-contained class significantly eases the burden of understanding a MODULE.

highlight.name: 62aad7de-69b8-d9b7-0b12-d2ce64bf6183
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Stripping interfaces down to deal with nothing but primitives can impoverish them.

highlight.name: 6658bae8-def5-cdaa-0ca7-c9f754040016
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Mathematicians are fanatical about not introducing extraneous concepts, and the property of closure provides them a way of defining an operation without involving any other concepts.

highlight.name: fc01d6da-162d-130a-b9c6-b2a5ae75e8df
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The property of closure tremendously simplifies the interpretation of an operation, and it is easy to think about chaining together or combining closed operations.

highlight.name: 1973b7d5-8b03-5fb0-067f-517b871a13b4
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: If the implementer has state that is used in the computation, then the implementer is effectively an argument of the operation, so the argument(s) and return value should be of the same type as the implementer.

highlight.name: eaeca1df-b9e6-112c-0cb1-de5e0894d3b2
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: you can’t just conjure up a new one to answer a question

highlight.name: 3729ece8-344e-d57c-09f8-5fe9b92f826b
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The argument matches the implementer, but the return type is different, or the return type matches the receiver and the argument is different. These operations are not closed, but they do give some of the advantages of CLOSURE. When the extra type is a primitive or basic library class, it frees the mind almost as much as CLOSURE.

highlight.name: c1c6b53e-4355-ea93-c303-f60d48fa9537
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The usefulness of a MODEL-DRIVEN DESIGN is sensitive to the quality of the detailed design and implementation decisions, and it only takes a few confused developers to derail a project from the goal.

highlight.name: f6bdcd2e-37ec-ec1d-e0b1-f7dd905e5846
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: ASSERTIONS can lead to much better designs, even with our relatively informal way of testing them.

highlight.name: b7f039a8-bcf5-19c8-5bf6-76f69226d950
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: This is tedious and fraught with error, and the bulk of it obscures the meaning of our model. (Some languages are better than others, but all require us to do a lot of grunt work.)

highlight.name: e81be323-62fc-ad1d-920a-e93c4ad846f8
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Generating a running program from a declaration of model properties is a kind of Holy Grail of MODEL- DRIVEN DESIGN, but it does have its pitfalls in practice.

highlight.name: f13e82ec-08ad-cd12-b1de-870b55f1233a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The unintended consequence of many attempts at declarative design is the dumbing-down of the model and application, as developers, trapped by the limitations of the framework, enact design triage in order to get something delivered.

highlight.name: ee952b3c-f46d-1df6-5bdb-0fd218ecbc9a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: undermine

highlight.name: 31c84055-3621-e636-4320-6789b2406caf
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: This control code introduces side effects, so that the behavior is no longer dictated completely by the declared rules. Adding, removing, or reordering the rules can cause unexpected, incorrect results. Therefore, a logic programmer has to be careful to keep the effect of code obvious, just as an object programmer does.

highlight.name: 4c4460d4-07cd-3d33-07ca-a7c06604924f
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: drudge

highlight.name: 224527f1-bec7-43d0-b9f9-20fd2c688b4e
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The best of these unburden developers of drudge work while leaving them complete freedom to design.

highlight.name: 23f80aee-477e-7eda-0345-4b6748bd247c
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: In this style, client code is written in a programming language tailored to a particular model of a particular domain.

highlight.name: 8b13dbfa-9e4d-f0da-77e0-335ca8b5ac0e
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: I’m all in favor of learning advanced technology and design concepts, but we have to soberly assess the skills of a particular team, as well as the likely skills of future maintenance teams. Also, there is value in the seamlessness of an application and a model implemented in the same language.

highlight.name: afef2356-c977-47ef-1620-315095e0ee08
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: bifurcating

highlight.name: 6dabb05c-6c91-f8ee-eb8f-ad53e6d2d8b7
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: SPECIFICATION is an adaptation of an established formalism, the predicate. Predicates have other useful properties that we can draw on, selectively.

highlight.name: 31b2d753-6bcd-86d7-30da-2e7d4d9812f4
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: However, other implementation options are possible that would minimize object count or boost speed, or perhaps be compatible with idiosyncratic technologies present in some project.

highlight.name: 2f819631-224e-026b-6a0d-00aeea7a6ea9
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: bogging

highlight.name: c2df5cf3-b134-4317-1e96-6ea9f90b65fc
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: When you want to test a candidate, you have to interpret this structure, which can be done by popping off each element, then evaluating it or popping off the next as required by an operator. You would end up with this:

highlight.name: 23692efb-41a0-2b8a-0809-5463d184ebd7
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: You have to find an implementation with trade-offs that work for your circumstances. The same pattern and model can underlie very different implementations.

highlight.name: 1b6f50c3-84e1-52b3-63b9-46a50fe1c5dc
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: stringent.

highlight.name: e19452ae-0a1f-8707-eefa-edee59860053
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: But what they asked for was a list of chemicals whose handling has become more stringent. Perhaps there are none in-house right now, or perhaps they just happened to be packed into a more stringent container. In either case, the report just described would not list them.

highlight.name: 18601027-2511-e7da-af4e-2244b8c1585a
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: In most situations it is best to avoid such complexity by making a choice, either forgoing some of the operators or forgoing subsumption.

highlight.name: 47622b73-1840-fc51-c7da-8e7425a69bc8
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: syndicated

highlight.name: 25a0727c-5c03-0260-802f-18c47244e586
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: granularity

highlight.name: c471e602-5e38-c568-74a4-6d257d5c4fb5
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: This might be a point where the granularity is too coarse. The conventional approach would be to break the calculation methods down into subroutines.

highlight.name: b999f216-48d2-c6c7-88ae-6b31e5d46f1e
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Model concepts are decoupled; operations entangle a minimum of other types.

highlight.name: 371afae9-6ab8-76e1-0a03-d0dde51c0cb0
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Sometimes, though, we can get a leg up.

highlight.name: 8243f5e8-9814-26e1-1219-3aec2573a711
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Analysis patterns are groups of concepts that represent a common construction in business modeling. It may be relevant to only one domain or it may span many domains.

highlight.name: 32534fb0-18c5-585d-fe6e-eac495663a85
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: posting rule.

highlight.name: a3a0afa9-196e-c7e9-7378-562441c4ed32
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: Accounting systems often provide multiple views of the same basic financial information. One account might track income while another might track an estimated tax on that income.

highlight.name: 237b0e8f-ddaf-c6ec-def2-42487935e761
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: If the system is expected to automatically update the estimated tax account, the implementation of those two accounts becomes very intertwined.

highlight.name: bad80c85-5889-a07d-2961-2457954a3aa9
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: 1. “Eager firing” is the most obvious, but typically the least practical. Whenever an Entry is inserted into an Account, it immediately triggers the Posting Rules and all updates are made immediately. 2. “Account-based firing” allows processing to be deferred. At some point, a message is sent to an Account and it triggers its Posting Rules to process all Entries inserted since its last firing. 3. Finally, “Posting-Rule-based firing” is initiated by an external agent, which tells the Posting Rule to fire. The Posting Rule is responsible for looking up all Entries made to its input Accounts since the last time it fired.

highlight.name: 7b57fe06-1080-a290-ab66-86fe573170b3
highlight.title: Guest
highlight.subject: 高亮
highlight.contents: The developers departed considerably from the details of the models presented in Analysis Patterns, yet they felt they had preserved the essence of the concepts. They were a little uncomfortable about involving the Asset in the selection of the Posting Rule. They went that way because the Asset had the knowledge of the nature of each Account (fee or interest) and was also the natural access point for the script. To have associated the rule object directly with the Account would have required a collaboration with the Asset object on each instantiation of the objects (each time the batch was run). Instead, they let the Asset object look up the two relevant rules through their SINGLETON access and pass them the appropriate Account. It seemed to make the code much more direct and so they made a pragmatic decision.
